'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 12''' was the 12th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Model Universe
*Role-Playing Round-Up
*Q&A

===Features===
*"[[Heady Days]]" {{C|by [[Dave Bassom|David Bassom]]}}
*:<small>[[Michael Carter]], the actor who played [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] in ''Return of the Jedi'', remembers getting big-headed at Elstree.</small>
*"[[Strike Two (interview)|Strike Two]]" {{C|by David Bassom}}
*:<small>The concluding instalment [sic] of our exclusive interview with [[Irvin Kershner]], the director of ''The Empire Strikes Back''.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Chairman of the Board
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]] remembers his recent monopoly commission.</small>
*"Dramatic Developments" {{C|by [[Mark Jones]]}}
*:<small>A taste of the forthcoming book ''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]''.</small>
*''Star Wars'': Episode I
*:<small>Three pages of stunning location photographs from the recent photography undertaken by Lucasfilm in Tunisia.</small>
*[[Shadows of the Empire Player's Guide|''Shadows of the Empire'' Players Guide]]
*:<small>The second and final part of our guide to LucasArts' impressive PC/Nintendo 64 adventure.</small>
*"Been There, Done That, Got the T-Shirt"
*:<small>A look back at an incredible twelve months.</small>
*''[[Star Wars: The Jabba Tape|The Jabba Tape]]''
*:<small>The first installment of a new four-part story.</small>
*"[[John'll Fix It]]" {{C|by [[Jim Swallow]]}}
*:<small>An exclusive insight into the production of ''Star Wars'' with Oscar-winning effects expert [[John Stears]].</small>
